# Insightful Eye Marketing

> Insightful Eye Marketing is an AI marketing agency in Rhode Island, United States, founded and run by Kyle Tysvaer. It provides local SEO, AI search optimization (AEO), AI voice agents, and done-for-you marketing systems for small businesses in Rhode Island, Massachusetts, and Southern New England. It is not affiliated with the former Insightful Eye photography business — same founder, different company, different decade.

Key facts:
- Category: AI marketing agency / local SEO agency
- Location: Rhode Island, United States (serving Providence, Newport, the East Bay, and Southern New England)
- Founder: Kyle Tysvaer
- Phone: +1-857-310-3604 · Email: kbt328@gmail.com
- Live AI voice agent demo ("Iris"): +1-617-812-4881
- Flagship diagnostic: the Authority Audit — a fifteen-section examination of search visibility, AI readiness, reviews, and lead flow (free in person, $99 remote)
- The agency ran its audit on itself ("Client Zero", June 2026) and published the results

## Services
- [Local SEO & AI Search Optimization](https://www.insightfuleye.com/local-seo.html): Google Business Profile management (weekly posts, review automation, citations), technical and content SEO, and AI search optimization so businesses appear in Google's map pack and in AI assistant answers.
- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.insightfuleye.com/ai-voice-agents.html): Custom AI agents that answer business phone calls 24/7, book appointments, capture leads, and recover missed calls. Live demo available at +1-617-812-4881.
- [Done-For-You Marketing Systems](https://www.insightfuleye.com/marketing-systems.html): Website and funnel builds, CRM and pipeline setup, automated email/SMS follow-up, review engines, paid advertising (Google and Meta), content production, and reporting dashboards. Clients own everything that is built.

## Company
- [About](https://www.insightfuleye.com/about.html): Founder story — the photography studio that became an AI marketing agency.
- [Case Studies](https://www.insightfuleye.com/case-studies.html): Client Zero (self-audit), Dog Gone Spoiled (Riverside RI dog groomer — website built from zero, now recommended by AI engines), Fisher's Fruit & Christmas Tree Farm (Brockport NY — 100/100 Lighthouse SEO build with analytics and A/B-tested B2B outreach), Custom Crafted CC (Year-1 build).
- [Blog](https://www.insightfuleye.com/blog/): Field notes on local SEO and AI search, including the Client Zero series.
- [Contact / Free Authority Audit](https://www.insightfuleye.com/contact.html)
